regulations.title: Legal Services Military Justice
regulations.purpose: This regulation prescribes the policies and procedures pertaining to the administration of military justice and implements the Manual for Courts -Martial ( MCM), United States, 2024, and the rules for courts -mar- tial (RCMs) contained in the MCM.
